proposals.spec_text: it sees the raw command that was sent (command type, parameters, sender)
proposals.actual: CommandEvent proto contains command type and parameters but no sender field
proposals.proposed_text: it sees the raw command that was sent (command type and parameters)
proposals.rationale: PhysicsServer routes commands without tracking sender identity. Adding sender tracking would require protocol-level changes beyond feature scope. FR-004 does not mention sender.
